svg.title: cite brand lockup
svg.desc: The cite product brand lockup showing opensource.legal as the parent brand in Inter above the cite wordmark in Source Serif, used in product headers, footers, and READMEs.

text.style: font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; fill: #64748B; letter-spacing: 0.8px;
font-family: 'Source Serif 4', 'Source Serif Pro', Georgia, serif; font-size: 48px; font-weight: 400; fill: #1E293B; letter-spacing: -1px;
